name: logia_memory
description: Portable agent memory service. Use this tool to persistently store facts, recall past context by searching memories, or reflect on your full memory history. Memories are stored as version-controlled markdown files — portable, human-readable, and ownable by the agent. Actions: 'remember' to store a new fact or observation, 'recall' to search your memories by keyword, 'reflect' to get an overview of everything you know.

action.description: The memory operation: 'remember' stores a fact, 'recall' searches memories, 'reflect' shows memory overview and history

content.description: For 'remember': the fact or observation to store. For 'recall': the search query. Not needed for 'reflect'.

category.description: Optional category to organize memories. 'notes' for general facts, 'interactions' for event logs, 'preferences' for patterns and habits.
